seasonality: Revenue is event-driven, spiking during high crypto-market volatility periods (e.g., liquidation cascades, macro shocks) and compressing during low-volume sideways markets.
rationale: DefiLlama reports dYdX v4 (Cosmos chain) trailing 30-day fees annualized at approximately $142M as of mid-2025, down from ~$200M+ peaks in 2024 following the v3-to-v4 migration volume drop. TVL sits near $385M per DefiLlama. Critically, dYdX v4 fees flow to validators and stakers on the dYdX Chain — NOT to the DYDX token treasury — meaning DYDX token holders capture near-zero direct protocol cash flow, making real yield effectively 0%; the ~4.2% staking yield is inflationary block rewards. P/S of ~3.2x is estimated using circulating market cap (~$455M at ~$1.55/token × ~293M circulating) divided by annualized revenue, though this ratio is economically weak given the fee-accrual disconnect.
